patches.hypothesis: The patch overfitted by hardcoding a null check that passes only one of the failing tests. The goal is now to write a more general and robust null check that covers all possible cases.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the boolean attribute not having a value. The method should return an empty string instead of null.

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the missing null check in the getValue() method. The method should return an empty string if the attribute value is null, but it is currently returning null instead.
The bug is caused by the method not handling the case where the attribute value is null. The fix is to add a null check and return an empty string when the value is null.
The bug is caused by the method returning a null value instead of an empty string when the attribute value is missing. The test is expecting an empty string, not a null value.
patches.changes: - return val; + return val != null ? val : "";
patches.diff: - return val; + return val != null ? val : "";
